Star Wars E3 DF03 OBI-WAN VS Super Battle Droid
['Product description', 'Episode III Revenge of the Sith. As a General in the Clone Wars, Obi-Wan Kenobi leads clone troopers into battle against the droid armies. He uses his skill as a Jedi Master and his control of the Force to defeat the deadly battle droids. This version shows battle dorid torn apart.', 'Amazon.com', 'Part of Hasbro\x92s line of', 'Revenge of the Sith', 'toys, this two-in-one action-figure pack features Obi-Wan Kenobi (dressed in traditional Jedi garb) and an enemy battle droid. The Kenobi figure is spring-loaded; just press down upon his head and release, and he strikes a battle pose, swinging his arms and lightsaber. The blue, beetle-like droid, meanwhile, doesn\x92t offer much mobility aside from it arms, though it does break apart at the abdomen, simulating a fatal wound.', '--Andy Boynton']

Alto Professional ACOM2 | Two-Channel Compressor / Limiter / Gate in One Compact, Low-Noise Rack Unit
['Alto Professional’s ACOM2 is a two-channel compressor/limiter/gate that gives you maximum clarity and smooth level control for any pro audio application.', 'Thanks to its two independent, full-featured compressor/limiters, you can use ACOM2 as two individual mono processors or link the processors to provide true-stereo compression. All it takes is the push of a button to switch between mono and stereo.ACOM2’s intelligent attack and release switch can automatically adjust the unit’s attack and release to the source signal, or you can use manual mode for tailored adjustment. At the heart of ACOM2’s minimized signal path is a premium VCA, which provides optimal temperature stability. But you’ll appreciate it even more for what it lacks: noise and distortion.', 'The Expander/Gate also gives you all the controls you need to suppress or block out unwanted noise. The sidechain function allows for external effects loops or other common compressor applications such as ducking. A second, internal sidechain employs a switchable low-cut filter to help control pumping due to heavy low-frequency content.', 'ACOM2 offers exactly what a great compressor should: smooth and consistent performance that doesn’t degrade or color your signal.', 'Technical Specifications', 'AUDIO INPUT', 'Type: Active balanced XLR + 1/4”', 'Type', ': Active balanced XLR + 1/4”', 'Impedance: Balanced: 50 kΩUnbalanced: 25 kΩ', 'Impedance', ':', 'Balanced: 50 kΩ', 'Balanced: 50 kΩ', 'Unbalanced: 25 kΩ', 'Unbalanced: 25 kΩ', 'Operating Level: +4 dBu /-10 dBV', 'Operating Level', ': +4 dBu /-10 dBV', 'Maximum input level: Balanced and unbalanced: +21 dBu', 'Maximum input level', ': Balanced and unbalanced: +21 dBu', 'AUDIO OUTPUT', 'Type: XLR + 1/4”', 'Type', ': XLR + 1/4”', 'Impedance: Balanced: 60 ΩUnbalanced: 30 Ω', 'Impedance', ':', 'Balanced: 60 Ω', 'Balanced: 60 Ω', 'Unbalanced: 30 Ω', 'Unbalanced: 30 Ω', 'Maximum output level: +21 dBu', 'Maximum output level', ': +21 dBu', 'Frequency Response: 20 Hz – 20,000 Hz (at +0,-0.5 dB)', 'Frequency Response', ': 20 Hz – 20,000 Hz (at +0,-0.5 dB)', 'Noise: > 90 dBu', 'Noise', ': > 90 dBu', 'Crosstalk: < 100 dB', 'Crosstalk', ': < 100 dB', ' RETURN', 'Type: 1/4”', 'Type', ': 1/4”', 'Impedance: > 10 kΩ', 'Impedance', ': > 10 kΩ', 'Maximum input level: +24 dBu', 'Maximum input level', ': +24 dBu', ' SEND', 'Type: 1/4”', 'Type', ': 1/4”', 'Impedance: 2 kΩ', 'Impedance', ': 2 kΩ', 'Maximum output level: +21 dBu', 'Maximum output level', ': +21 dBu', 'POWER', '95-120 V; 210-240 V, 50-60 Hz', '95-120 V; 210-240 V, 50-60 Hz', 'Fuse: 210-240 V:', 'Fuse', ': 210-240 V:', 'Fuse: T200 mAL 250 VAC 95-120 V:', 'Fuse', ': T200 mAL 250 VAC 95-120 V:', 'Fuse: T400 mAL 250 VAC', 'Fuse', ': T400 mAL 250 VAC', '', '(width x depth x height): 19” x 7.7” x 1.7”', 'WEIGHT:', '6.83 lbs', 'Box Contents', 'ACOM2', 'ACOM2', 'Power Cable', 'Power Cable', 'User Guide', 'User Guide', 'Safety Instructions & Warranty Information Booklet', 'Safety

Rockin' Rider Lavender - Grow-With-Me Pony, Pink
['Rockin\' Rider Lavender Grow-with-Me Pony grows with your child from a bouncer (9m+) to a rocker (12m+) to a spring horse (24m+). She sings the exclusive "I\'m a Little Pony" song when her right ear is pressed and says 6 fun talking phrases with sound effects when her left ear is pressed. Your child will be amazed by Lavender\'s synchronized moving mouth when she sings and talks. The soft and huggable plush is preferred by both Moms and Kids. Parents will appreciate that Lavender converts from rocker to spring horse in minutes without tools. The safety seat is safe for toddlers as young as 9 months and can be removed as your child grows. Additional features include motion-activated galloping sounds, 2-position stirrups, easy-grip handles, a detailed colorful saddle, embroidered eyes, and a sturdy plastic base. Parents can select the volume level that\'s right for their home. Some assembly required. Saddle height in bouncer and rocker mode is 15 inches. Saddle height in spring horse mode is 19 inches. Requires 3 AA batteries included. Lavender is recommended for ages 9 to 36 months and up to 50 lbs.']

Manhattan Toy Pup Match Up 35 Piece Dog Themed Toddler Matching and Memory Game
["Have fun searching for doggy accessories in this stylin' matching game! Choose your pup and take turns finding the six matching tiles to the accessories on your pup. How to play: choose one of the five pup cards, place all accessories tiles pattern side up, take turns finding the matching accessories found on your pup card. The first player to find all six accessories wins! Includes 35 pieces - 5 pup cards and 30 accessory tiles. All pieces store nicely in the game box with a sliding tray. Encourages motor development, fostering memory skills and cognitive development. Since 1978, Manhattan Toy has been making award-winning, high quality, educational toys for your baby, toddler or kid. From infant toys and baby toys to sensory development toys, our goal is to provide the safest and best toys available. All of our products, from the newest concepts to our time-tested classics, are innovatively designed to inspire imaginative play."]
['PUP MATCH UP GAME : High quality and decorative storage box comes with five different rigid dog cards featuring a corgi, poodle, Scottish terrier, French bulldog, Afghan hound plus 30 accessory tiles.', ' GOOD TIME: Kids are truly eager to learn during their early years when their brain is growing rapidly. Breaking out the Pup Match Up Game is an excellent way to foster cognitive, emotional (sense of accomplishment) and social (group dynamics) developmental skills.', ' ,  : Our in-house designers poured their creative energies into this playful memory game to not only give it visual appeal, but to durably construct it to withstand ongoing play throughout the toddler and preschool years.', 'AGE : Dog-themed memory game for kids is safety rated and suitable for children ages 3 years and up.', " BY OUR BRAND: If you're reading this, you've found a safe toy from a real company and a brand that cares. Since 1978, Manhattan Toy has been a trusted source of imaginative toys for babies, toddlers and kids of all ages. All of our toys are rigorously safety tested and every toy has our 800 number with a dedicated customer support team to answer your call."]

['This customizable car delivers two paint jobs in one! BMC WW2 German King Tiger Tank - Tan 1:32 Vehicle for Plastic Army Men
["From the BMC Toys  HERO  SERIES, the tank that terrified the Allies: The WW2 GERMAN KING TIGER TANK features lots of authentic detail and a turret that swivels. Tank is made from stiff, very durable, tan polypropylene plastic with very little flashing, measures 10 x 4.5 x 3.5 inches tall and is 1:32nd scale. This tank's official designation was Panzerkampfwagen Tiger Ausf. B, but it was also known as Tiger II, Königstiger (German for Bengal Tiger), Royal Tiger, and King Tiger. It was first used in combat during the Allied Invasion of Normandy, and only 492 were produced. BMC Toys was founded by Bill McMaster in 1991 and specializes in producing historically accurate plastic army men figures, playsets and accessories in the classic style of the 1950s and 1960s. Packaged in plain polybag and recommended for ages 5 and up. The 2019 release features an optional sticker sheet. Creativity for Kids Rainbow Garden Stone - Mosaic Stepping Stone Kit, Craft Kits for Kids 8-12+
['Enhance the wonder of nature with a glowing garden stone that will personalize your lawn! Creativity for Kids Rainbow Garden Stone comes with everything crafters need to decorate a rainbow stepping stone! Kids garden stone kit includes pre-molded cement garden stone (10” diameter), weather resistant resin, plastic mosaic tiles, glow in the dark paint, plastic gloves, plastic cup, 2 stirring sticks, pipette, wood stick, sticky putty, mosaic tile stylus and illustrated instructions. Making a mosaic has never been easier with included mosaic tile stylus! Simply pick up tiles with the tip of the putty filled stylus and place the tiles in the weather resistant resin to make a patterned design. Making resin is a fun science experiment for kids of all skill levels! To create the weather resistant resin, you must carefully mix together the part A and part B resin. Place the resin you create in the pre-molded cement garden stone. Then, place vibrant plastic tiles in the mold to create a design with unique colors and patterns! The Creativity for Kids garden stone also glows in the dark! Use fluorescent paint to make your garden and lawn gleam. Fill in the star molds with the included glow-in-the-dark paint. When the paint dries turn the lights out or wait until it’s dark outside to watch your garden stone cast a subtle glow! Let your finished garden stone sit for 24 hours for it cure into a permanent mosaic stepping stone! Crafting your own garden stone is a unique outdoor activity that will connect crafters with nature while building creative confidence. Since 1976, Creativity for kids has proudly made fun and creative experiences to nurture children’s confidence for life! Craft kit for kids is recommended for ages 8+.']

['Give a Minecraft player over an iconic diamond sword – on a giant scale! ['For more than 20 years, the MXR micro amp has been a staple among the world’s top artists because of its ability to boost and sweeten up your guitar or bass tone and drive the front of your amp. The Micro amp+ builds on that classic pedal with EQ controls-so you can finely sculpt your boosted signal-along with Other upgrades that take this powerful boost box to the next level. With its gain Knob, the Micro amp+ allows you to dial up just as much gain as the original-up to +26db-but with added EQ controls, you can now finely sculpt your boosted signal. For the classic Micro amp sound, set the bass and treble controls to noon. Along with these upgrades, The Micro amp+ now has low-noise OP amps-so you don’t get any extra noise at super high levels-and true bypass switching. With the sturdy housing and durable components that MXR is known for, This pedal is ready for the road.']

Disney Treasures From the Vault, Limited Edition Lady Plush, Amazon Exclusive, 3+ years
['Relive the magic of Disney with the Treasures From the Vault Plush. Inspired by Disney’s “Lady and the Tramp”, the Limited Edition Lady Plush is the first collectible character in this exclusive Amazon series. Sitting 12 inches tall and made of soft velour fabric with embroidered eyes, Lady is wearing her signature gold pendant collar. She even includes a Certificate of Authenticity and comes in a window box featuring exclusive Disney Treasures From the Vault packaging with gold foil detailing; ideal for collectors. Collect all twelve of these commemorative Disney plush. Ages 3+ Among the many treasures that can be found in Walt Disney’s faithfully re-constructed office suite at the Walt Disney Studios is a Lady plush toy from the 1955 Disney Animated classic film “Lady and the Tramp”. Walt Disney surprised his wife one Christmas with a puppy hidden in a hatbox topped with a large bow. Nearly twenty-five years later, this personal story would become the inspiration for the scene in “Lady and the Tramp” when Lady as a puppy, pops out of a hatbox as a Christmas gift from Jim Dear to Darling.']
['First commemorative plush in the 2021 Treasures From the Vault Plush collection. Each month a new limited edition commemorative plush is being revealed, exclusively on Amazon. ['This is a limited edition version of the SLA Industries 2nd Edition with a Spot UV logo. Made specifically for retail launch.\xa0 SLA Industries\xa0(pronounced\xa0"Slay Industries") is an award-winning pen-and-paper role-playing game that was first published in Scotland in 1993. The game is a horror noir science-fiction setting set in a dystopian reality in which the majority of the known universe is either owned or indirectly controlled by the eponymous corporation SLA Industries. The game incorporates themes from the cyberpunk, gothic horror and conspiracy genres, and has always been praised on the quality of writing and art. The World of Progress, the universe in which SLA Industries operates, is a science-fiction image of the\xa01980s, where the fax machine spews out information alongside green-screen computers and vat-grown biogenetic monsters, who compete with humans and exotic alien races for work in an overgrown city that plunges deep underground.\xa0 Players in\xa0SLA Industries\xa0take on the role of an\xa0Operative, the highly-trained and well-equipped freelancers that serve as the company\'s agents, investigators and enforcers. Operatives perform tasks for both a pay packet and the promise of an increase in their security clearance, as both provide them access to an increased standard of living, better equipment, progression up the corporate ladder and sponsorship opportunities. Most of all though, they strive for the one thing that everyone in the media-driven World of Progress wants: Notoriety.\xa0 Made in Lithuania.']

['With this Spidey and his Amazing Friends Theme 3rd Birthday Balloon Bouquet you will receive: (1) 36" Spidey and his Amazing Friends Shape Foil Balloons, (1) 34" Giant Red Number 3 Foil Balloon, (2) 17" Round Spidey and his Amazing Friends Foil Balloons, (1) 18" Round Birthday Present Foil Balloon, (9) 11" Latex balloons 2- Pale Blue, 2- Red and 2- Blue. All balloons ship flat. Just add Helium to the balloons and ENJOY. Inflate balloons same day of event. Latex balloons have an average indoor float time of 12-24 hours. Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier.   HAZARD: Children under 8 years old can choke or suffocate on broken balloons or balloons that are not inflated. ADULT SUPERVISION REQUIRED. Discard broken balloons immediately. ['Experience a new way to play the bestselling tile-laying game Carcassonne! Thousands of years before the first bricks were laid to build the medieval city of Carcassonne, the area was settled by a prehistoric people who hunted wild animals, gathered berries, and caught fish to ensure their survival. Only cave paintings and archaeological finds hint at the lives of these prosperous hunters and gatherers!InCarcassonne: Hunters & Gatherers, just as in the original game, players take turns placing tiles and meeples to score points from a growing landscape. But rather than cities, roads, farms, and monasteries, players build forests, rivers, lakes, and meadows, and place hunters, gatherers, and fisher meeples for points. Featuring familiar rules but adding a handful of new bonuses and scoring variations, Hunters & Gatherers has something for both new and veteran Carcassonne players to love.']
[' GAME: Fish, hunt, and gather from the prehistoric landscape and compete with other tribes for claim over key natural features in this exciting stand-alone game inspired by the classic Carcassonne which provides plenty of ways to use your cunning and outsmart your opponents.', 'A  TO  TIMES: A mammoth herd stomps across the grasslands to drink from a crystal-blue river. Roosebeck Mountain Dulcimer 4-String Cutaway F-Holes ScrollBlemished
['The Cutaway Dulcimer plays the same and sounds the same as a traditional mountain dulcimer. One side, however, is narrower which allows the dulcimer to be played in a "guitar position" in addition to the normal "lap position". Thus the fingering is inverted from normal style. It is kind of a missing link between the traditonal mountain dulcimer and our "stick style" Wildwood Dulcimer. The inverted fingerings are a little easier for guitar players but it still produces the rich, full sound of a mountain dulcimer. When you want to play in a traditional style, lay it flat and play it like any other mountain dulcimer. The solid spruce soundboard features three " f " holes. The back, sides, and fretboard, are rosewood. The fretboard has arches underneath allowing free space between the soundboard and the fretboard. The carved scroll peghead has geared 4:1 banjo style tuners. Special Note: The strings put on the instruments in our workshops, while playable, are put through some rigorous testing. They should probably be replaced for improved playability, sound quality, and better tuning shortly after you receive the instrument. Features:']
['Made with Solid Rosewood', 'Solid European Spruce Soundboard', 'Shipped insured', 'Brand New!']

["At first glance, this cube looks deceptively easy to scramble and solve, with the incorrect assumption that it turns like a regular 2x2x2. The true challenge is quickly revealed after a few simple twists radically alter the cubic shape. The unpredictable shape changes are produced by a concept called 'bandaging', combined with a shape transformation technique often referred to as 'modding'. The puzzle is actually a 3x3x3 cube with pieces fused ('bandaged') together and extended to produce a simpler looking puzzle. There are several different solved states that are all indistinguishable from one another, meaning there is more than one solution. The puzzle is off center for turning. Designed by Justin Eplett. WARNING! SMALL PARTS CHOKING HAZARD!"]

Orange OMEC Teleport USB Audio Interface
['The omec Teleport interface is a universal connection device (iOS, Android, Mac, PC) without any specific drivers or software requirements. It features high quality ADC/DAC converters – Through a USB B connector – housed in a small effect pedal enclosure. The Teleport allows you to convert both analog audio signals (an instrument for example) to digital to be processed with the many applications available. Additionally, the Teleport gives you the ability to convert digital audio signals to analogue (through mixers, D.I. Boxes, amplifiers, etc.). With this versatility the Teleport can be used for a wide range of applications: musicians that want to play, record, mix or process their sound, with the autonomy provided by mobile devices; Bluetooth connected musicians, like keyboard players or DJs employing the same devices for their sessions; even the amateur music lover who wants to convert music stored on their devices to analogue with renewed quality.']
['Mono in and stereo out with a parallel buffer. There’s no limit to what you do with your signal. Now you can experiment with stereo effects from a single channel input signal', 'The latency for the omec Teleport audio interface can go as low as 4Ms (depending on connected hardware). that’s pretty instant!', 'Built in a robust but lightweight pedal enclosure', 'The omec Teleport uses the same 9V DC input as your other pedals', 'Uses a buffered bypass to avoid the tonal effect of adding additional cable to your signal chain']

['The Artful Skwish from Manhattan Toy is an artistic twist of a time-honored classic, instantly recognizable, an intriguing blend of ingenious design and developmental function. Skwish may not turn every baby into a mathematical genius, but every baby can joyfully benefit from its unique developmental features. Its natural finish and one-of-a-kind shape instantly capture baby’s attention. The lightweight wooden dowels, smooth finish, and elastic ties make it easy for little hands to grab and hold. Babies will love “Skwishing” it down and watching it return to its original shape – Skwish is a perfect hand-held toy for developing gross motor skills. The wooden pieces slide back and forth along the dowels when shaken, producing a very pleasing rattle that allows baby to explore sound and learn cause and effect. The spatial and tactile elements have been shown to be helpful to those on the Autism spectrum. Skwish is carefully constructed of sustainable wood and features a smooth tri-colored exterior surface. Since 1978, Manhattan Toy has been making award-winning, high quality, educational toys for your baby, toddler, or kid. All of our products, from the newest concepts to our time-tested classics, are innovatively designed to inspire imaginative play.']

["Our LASE 201C Crank-up Speaker Stands help lighten the load.With most speaker stands, you set the shaft-height first, then try to balance the speaker cabinet on top. ['Austin and Marita first met Pebble’s founders, Samantha and her husband Morshed, at a Craft Fair in the capital city of Dhaka. Over the years, the Millers consulted with them frequently, amazed at Pebble’s quality control and their business growth model. Pebble started when Samantha began teaching a dozen women how to knit and crochet in 2004, with the hopes of producing products that could be sold on the international market. By the time the Millers met her, Pebble had grown to be a job source for more than 2000 women. Today, Pebble provides jobs to more than 12,000 women in over 120 rural centers. Employees can walk to work, taking their little ones with them. Most of the centers have a nursery and/or preschool for the little ones. Employees are paid a living wage. This commitment to equity impacts entire communities as women are given a voice in their communities. Women in these areas no longer need to leave their children with grandparents and migrate to the cities in search of employment.']

MXL Revelation Mini FET Delivers Classic Tube Warmth Type Effect in FET Based Design
['Product Description', 'Revelation Mini FET is a compact, large diaphragm condenser microphone inspired by the Revelation tube microphone. As such, it differs from typical FET condensers by providing more warmth and richness in the mid-range, a smoother top end and softer transient response. The Revelation Mini FET utilizes a 32mm center terminating, gold-sputtered capsule combined with a low noise circuit. The inclusion of a -10/-20db pad allows the mic to be used on a variety of sources. The Revelation Mini FET has been designed with the modern creator in mind. Hand-selected components were vital in ensuring the Mini FET would not be another “generic” condenser. Its tight low-end and rich mid-range make this microphone a perfect solution for keeping the character and natural feel of a source. This mic is certain to deliver, whether it’s used for drums, screaming guitar, or smooth vocals.', 'From the Manufacturer', 'The MXL  MINI FET is a compact, large diaphragm condenser microphone inspired by the legendary MXL  tube microphone. MXL set out to design a smaller, FET-based microphone that would carry the classic tone and sonic image of the , while increasing durability and versatility for a variety of studio and live applications. The  MINI FET utilizes a premium 32mm center terminating, gold-sputtered capsule combined with a low noise circuit to provide a classic sound for a range of uses. The FET-based circuit design offers a low noise and discreet signal path when paired with the 32mm capsule, allowing the  MINI to deliver the classic  sound at a lower price. The inclusion of a -10/-20db pad allows the mic to be used on a variety of sources including hard-hitting kick drums, blasting trumpets and everything in-between. The REVELATION MINI FET has been designed to exceed expectations. From its black chrome accents to the hand-selected FET and capacitors, the REVELATION MINI FET is sure to stand out in your mic locker by emphasizing the natural characteristics of vocals and instrumentals.']
['FET based design providing “classic tube warmth”', '3 stage pad perfect for managing loud sources', 'All-around studio flexibility: as good on kick drum as it is on vocals', '48V Phantom power', 'Includes MXL case | MXL 70 shock mount']
